prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains to the Department for Digital, Culture, Media and Sport (DCMS), which is a UK government department primarily focused on matters that affect England. It does not directly apply to Scotland, Wales, or Northern Ireland, as their administrations may have separate protocols.
